summary: Iteration 131 - Route Redirects, Knowledge Graph Integration, Client Pack Voice Command & PDF. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All tested features working correctly. Route redirects (/next-actions → /next-best-actions, /knowledge-graph → /advisor-command-center) work correctly. Knowledge Graph nav item removed from sidebar. AI Knowledge Graph section integrated into Advisor Command Center with graph stats, query buttons, and copilot input. Client pack voice command and PDF generation working.

issues: Modal appears on every page load - consider persisting 'Don't show again' preference

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 131 verified: (1) /next-actions redirects to /next-best-actions, (2) /knowledge-graph redirects to /advisor-command-center, (3) Knowledge Graph nav item removed from Adviser Mode sidebar, (4) AI Knowledge Graph section integrated into Advisor Command Center with graph stats (nodes, relationships, insights, pending), query buttons, copilot input, and graph insights, (5) Voice command with client_pack intent returns client_pack type, (6) PDF generation for client_pack type returns valid PDF, (7) VoiceAssistant.jsx has ClientPackCard component mapped. All Knowledge Graph APIs (/api/graph/overview, /api/graph/insights) working. All Advisor Command Center APIs working.
